GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic checks close to the module using vitest run
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: Cross-package integration surfaces touched by the current wave
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Full monorepo regression via pnpm test
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, cookies, auth headers, session tokens, or raw high-risk payloads. Redact query strings in URLs.

VF-001.NAME: FullClipHappyPath
VF-001.scenario: User clips an authenticated page with 5 images; all images download and save locally; markdown links rewritten to wikilinks.
VF-001.expected-outcome: Note created in vault with 5 local attachments and correct wikilink references; frontmatter with source meta and assets_saved=5.

required-signals.trace-sequence: BLOCK_DISCOVER_ASSETS -> BLOCK_FETCH_ASSET -> BLOCK_BUILD_PACKAGE -> BLOCK_TRANSPORT -> BLOCK_RECEIVE -> BLOCK_WRITE_FILE -> BLOCK_REWRITE_LINKS -> BLOCK_CREATE_NOTE -> RETURNED

VF-002.NAME: PartialSuccess
VF-002.scenario: 2 of 5 images fail to download; note still saves with 3 local attachments and failure report.
VF-002.expected-outcome: Note saved; frontmatter shows assets_saved=3, assets_failed=2; failed assets marked with HTML comment in markdown.

required-signals.trace-sequence: BLOCK_FETCH_ASSET -> (2x FETCH_FAILED) -> BLOCK_BUILD_PACKAGE -> BLOCK_RECEIVE -> BLOCK_WRITE_FILE -> BLOCK_REWRITE_LINKS -> BLOCK_CREATE_NOTE -> RETURNED

VF-003.NAME: NameConflictResolution
VF-003.scenario: Clip a page where attachment filename conflicts with existing vault file.
VF-003.expected-outcome: generateSafeName appends counter suffix; no overwrite; note links to new name.

VF-004.NAME: PluginUnavailable
VF-004.scenario: Extension attempts to send package but Obsidian plugin is not running.
VF-004.expected-outcome: TransportError with code PLUGIN_UNAVAILABLE; clear error shown to user.

VF-005.NAME: TokenRedaction
VF-005.scenario: Clip a page with sensitive query params and auth cookies.
VF-005.expected-outcome: No tokens, cookies, or auth headers appear in any log output or frontmatter.

required-signals.assertion: All log outputs pass redaction check — no auth headers, cookies, or tokens.

VF-006.NAME: AuthTokenRejection
VF-006.scenario: Plugin has auth token configured; request arrives without valid token.
VF-006.expected-outcome: HTTP 401 with MANIFEST_INVALID error; no vault writes.

VF-007.NAME: ManifestValidation
VF-007.scenario: Invalid CapturePackage sent to plugin (missing fields, wrong version).
VF-007.expected-outcome: Rejected with MANIFEST_INVALID or MANIFEST_VERSION_MISMATCH; no vault writes.

required-signals.assertion: MANIFEST_INVALID must not trigger any vault writes.

scenarios.scenario-2: Invalid CapturePackage rejected with descriptive Zod error.
scenarios.scenario-4: sanitizeFilename removes unsafe characters, handles edge cases.
scenarios.scenario-6: extractFilenameFromUrl handles data:, blob:, query strings, encoded paths.
scenarios.scenario-7: buildResultStatus returns correct status for all combinations.

required-trace-assertions.assertion-1: Validation failure must not emit downstream processing blocks.

V-M-SHARED-TYPES.wave-follow-up: Integration check against clipper-fork and obsidian-plugin consuming shared types.
V-M-SHARED-TYPES.phase-follow-up: Full regression suite across all packages.

scenarios.scenario-1: Template with variables and filters renders correctly.
scenarios.scenario-2: Invalid template syntax produces parse error with line/column.
scenarios.scenario-4: validateVariables detects unknown variables and suggests corrections.
scenarios.scenario-5: validateFilters detects unknown filters and suggests corrections.

V-M-TEMPLATE-ENGINE.wave-follow-up: Check template rendering in clipper-fork note generation.

scenarios.scenario-1: discoverAssets finds img[src], img[srcset], picture source[srcset] elements.
scenarios.scenario-2: parseSrcset handles descriptors, multiple URLs, empty input.
scenarios.scenario-3: fetchAssets downloads image data as base64 with credentials: include.
scenarios.scenario-4: fetchAssets on 403 returns FETCH_FORBIDDEN per asset.
scenarios.scenario-6: buildCapturePackage produces valid CapturePackage with correct linkMap.
scenarios.scenario-8: sendCapturePackage POSTs to correct URL with optional auth header.
scenarios.scenario-9: sendCapturePackage to offline server throws TransportError(PLUGIN_UNAVAILABLE).
scenarios.scenario-10: checkHealth returns true for running server, false otherwise.

required-trace-assertions.assertion-1: Failed fetch must not prevent remaining assets from being fetched.
required-trace-assertions.assertion-2: No auth headers or cookies in any log output.

V-M-CLIPPER-FORK.wave-follow-up: Integration test with Obsidian plugin receiver.
V-M-CLIPPER-FORK.phase-follow-up: End-to-end test with live browser extension.

scenarios.scenario-2: validateCapturePackage rejects invalid JSON with MANIFEST_INVALID.
scenarios.scenario-3: validateCapturePackage rejects wrong major version with MANIFEST_VERSION_MISMATCH.
scenarios.scenario-4: writeAttachment decodes base64 and writes binary to vault path.
scenarios.scenario-5: writeAttachment returns WRITE_FAILED on vault error.
scenarios.scenario-6: rewriteMarkdown converts markdown image URLs to wikilinks.
scenarios.scenario-7: rewriteMarkdown converts to relative paths when configured.
scenarios.scenario-9: resolveAttachmentDir works for same-as-note, subfolder, and global strategies.
scenarios.scenario-10: resolveNotePath uses defaultNoteFolder and filename from pathHint.
scenarios.scenario-11: resolveAttachmentPath generates unique names on conflict.
scenarios.scenario-12: prependFrontmatter includes all meta fields and asset counts.
scenarios.scenario-13: executeClipTransaction produces correct ResultReport on happy path.
scenarios.scenario-14: executeClipTransaction handles partial failures (note still saved).
scenarios.scenario-15: HTTP server rejects invalid auth token with 401.

required-trace-assertions.assertion-1: MANIFEST_INVALID must not trigger any vault writes.
required-trace-assertions.assertion-2: Partial write failure must still produce a note with failure metadata.
required-trace-assertions.assertion-4: Auth token rejection must not trigger vault writes.

V-M-OBSIDIAN-PLUGIN.phase-follow-up: End-to-end test with live Obsidian instance.

Gate-Phase-1.goal: Shared types, schemas, and template engine validated.

required-evidence.evidence-2: Template engine renders all standard filters.

Gate-Phase-2.goal: Browser extension discovers, fetches, and packages assets correctly.

required-evidence.evidence-1: Discovery finds all img/src/srcset elements in test DOM.
required-evidence.evidence-4: Transport sends and receives with auth token.

Gate-Phase-3.goal: Plugin receives, validates, writes, rewrites, and creates notes end-to-end.

required-evidence.evidence-1: Valid package produces note with correct local links.
required-evidence.evidence-2: Invalid manifest rejected before any vault write.
required-evidence.evidence-3: Partial failure still produces a note.
required-evidence.evidence-4: Auth token rejection returns 401 without vault writes.
required-evidence.evidence-5: Frontmatter contains source meta and asset counts.

Gate-Phase-4.goal: Full integration with hash dedup, CSS bg images, security hardening.

required-evidence.evidence-1: SHA-256 dedup prevents duplicate file creation.
required-evidence.evidence-2: Token redaction passes security audit check.
required-evidence.evidence-4: CSS background-image URLs discovered when enabled.
required-evidence.evidence-5: All module-level and phase-level checks green.
